summary: Autonomous dedupe-only pass using hydrated preflight state at main 9881a808f2fc0d5302f98a040a9efaad00336097. #45028 remains the best open canonical for the Control UI to externally backed channel routing family. No open issue is safe for instant close in this pass; most candidates are related but have distinct remaining work. #44424 and #69326 are already closed and are kept skipped. Linked PR #73402 is quarantined to central security triage because the hydrated bot review raises an auth-boundary finding.
